description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a strong build, wearing a sleeveless tank top and a pair of loose-fitting jeans. His arms are exposed, showing defined muscles, and he stands with a relaxed but confident posture. The figure is also wearing a belt and a pair of athletic sneakers, adding to the casual, urban appearance. The head is closely shaved, and the facial features are well-defined, with a neutral expression. The clothing fits snugly on the upper body and more loosely on the lower body, typical of casual streetwear. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall look is practical and suited for everyday urban environments.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless tank top, jeans, and sneakers, standing in a relaxed, confident pose. The figure has a closely shaved head and a casual, urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular build, sleeveless tank top, belt, and relaxed stance with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm definition, profile of the face, and the fit of the tank top and jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad back, exposed arms, belt, and the loose fit of the jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm, side profile, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless tank top and loose-fitting jeans with a belt
